accessibility.text: Intuit Intelligence is a secure, conversational AI platform designed for open-ended business analysis. It will enable users to explore complex business questions and get accurate answers without building dashboards or wrangling spreadsheets.
Engagement \u2028(5%, 30% repeat users)\u2028\u2028Usefulness\u2028>80%\u2028\u2028Product stickiness and reducing churn\u20285-10%
Customers struggle with Analysis Paralysis \u2028The sheer volume of data and reports is overwhelming, making it difficult to find timely, actionable insights for strategic decision-making.\u2028
Data Security\u2028While customers are already using public AI tools like ChatGPT for business intelligence, they are concerned about privacy and the security of their sensitive financial data.
